title: Built It Cycle Tour a roaring success
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Yearly Built It Cycle...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Yearly Built It Cycle Tour took place on Saturday 8 November in Oudtshoorn with over a 275 cyclicts taking part in this popular race.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Yearly Built It Cycle Tour took place on Saturday 8 November in Oudtshoorn with over a 275 cyclicts taking part in this popular race."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"28km results","html":"28km results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RJ Van Lill won the U13 Boys category with a time of 55:02.03, followed by Rikus Kapp at 59:07.71.","html":"RJ Van Lill won the U13 Boys category with a time of 55:02.03, followed by Rikus Kapp at 59:07.71."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jaco von Mollendorff secured third place in the Tandem category with a time of 1:01:11.64, which was also recorded for another entry.","html":"Jaco von Mollendorff secured third place in the Tandem category with a time of 1:01:11.64, which was also recorded for another entry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eli Miles led the U11 Boys category, finishing fifth overall at 1:01:57.37.","html":"Eli Miles led the U11 Boys category, finishing fifth overall at 1:01:57.37."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chanel Schuin was the top female finisher in the open category, completing the race in 1:03:29.51.","html":"Chanel Schuin was the top female finisher in the open category, completing the race in 1:03:29.51."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The results include various categories, with notable performances from both male and female participants across age groups."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"54km results","html":"54km results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Camaron Wilcox and Ferdi Botha tied for first in the U17 Boys category, both finishing in 1:26:21.72.","html":"Camaron Wilcox and Ferdi Botha tied for first in the U17 Boys category, both finishing in 1:26:21.72."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hayden Salzwedel followed closely in third place at 1:27:27.48.","html":"Hayden Salzwedel followed closely in third place at 1:27:27.48."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siphosihle Lucas won the U15 Boys category with a time of 1:27:47.00, while Amoné Büser led the U17 Girls category at 1:37:12.78.","html":"Siphosihle Lucas won the U15 Boys category with a time of 1:27:47.00, while Amoné Büser led the U17 Girls category at 1:37:12.78."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Open category saw a competitive field, with multiple participants finishing closely together, including Caleb Kock and Johan Montzinger.","html":"The Open category saw a competitive field, with multiple participants finishing closely together, including Caleb Kock and Johan Montzinger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The results reflect a diverse range of competitors, including junior and open categories, with several participants achieving notable times.","html":"The results reflect a diverse range of competitors, including junior and open categories, with several participants achieving notable times."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"104km results","html":"104km results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miguel Carvalho topped the Vets Men (30-39) category with a time of 2:36:42.0, sharing the same time with several elite competitors.","html":"Miguel Carvalho topped the Vets Men (30-39) category with a time of 2:36:42.0, sharing the same time with several elite competitors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Elite Men U23 category featured multiple participants finishing at 2:36:42.0, indicating a highly competitive race.","html":"The Elite Men U23 category featured multiple participants finishing at 2:36:42.0, indicating a highly competitive race."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rachel Seaman was the top female finisher in the Elite Ladies U23 category, completing the race in 3:06:04.0.","html":"Rachel Seaman was the top female finisher in the Elite Ladies U23 category, completing the race in 3:06:04.0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The results highlight a mix of age categories, including Vets and Junior Men, with various finish times reflecting the competitive nature of the event.","html":"The results highlight a mix of age categories, including Vets and Junior Men, with various finish times reflecting the competitive nature of the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Notably, several participants did not finish (DNF), indicating the challenges faced during the race.","html":"Notably, several participants did not finish (DNF), indicating the challenges faced during the race."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Street mile results","html":"Street mile results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Street Mile event, Rachel Seaman achieved the fastest time for females at 2:46.1, while Ferdi Botha led the male competitors with a time of 2:20.8.","html":"In the Street Mile event, Rachel Seaman achieved the fastest time for females at 2:46.1, while Ferdi Botha led the male competitors with a time of 2:20.8."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The results showcase a blend of junior and elite competitors, emphasising the event's inclusivity across different age groups and categories.","html":"The results showcase a blend of junior and elite competitors, emphasising the event's inclusivity across different age groups and categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Overall, the Cycle Tour 2025 results illustrate a successful event with strong performances across various categories and distances, highlighting the competitive spirit and dedication of the participants.","html":"Overall, the Cycle Tour 2025 results illustrate a successful event with strong performances across various categories and distances, highlighting the competitive spirit and dedication of the participants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Built It Cycle Tour a roaring success
